taxonomy: Stigmaphyllon angulosum belongs to the family Malpighiaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the Barbados achiote or aciote tree family. This family is part of the order Malpighiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions.
